cpu: AMD A10-5800K APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Game launched in a black screen in the default version( I assume due to the default resolution being the minimum) I changed it to an old beta version of proton and it seemed to work somewhat okay albeit with some glitchyness in the menus and fonts. After changing the resolution to 1080p, I changed back to Proton 4.2-9 and it works flawlessly!
title: Battle Grounds III

notes:
with proton 4.11-1 crashes after loading
same as 4.2-9
but 3.16-9 works just fine but you also need this launch option because the screen will become black or half-black if you don't set resolution in launch option
"command% -w 1920 -h 1080"
change it to your own resolution
title: Battle Grounds III
